title: Design System: Which AI Made This?

display.purpose: H1 on the home, compare, lab-guess, and rankings pages at the sm+ breakpoint.

headline.purpose: H1 at the mobile breakpoint (one step down from Display).

title.purpose: Section headings: the 'With Design Skill' group labels and the rankings model name.

subtitle.purpose: Card titles. The model name on each gallery card.

body.purpose: Long-form prose: home intro, rankings notes, compare subtitle. Cap at 65–75ch.

label.purpose: Field labels in compare selects, micro-meta, nav text.

eyebrow.purpose: Wide-tracked uppercase. Lab-Guess results card only.

shadows.name: hairline-lift
shadows.purpose: Always-on micro-elevation for the floating glass nav, glass dropdowns, and compare action buttons. Reads as a hint of float, not as lift.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Gallery cards on hover, paired with translateY(-6px). The one moment of visible elevation in the gallery.

shadows.name: tooltip
shadows.purpose: Variant-switcher tooltip surfaces. Softer and wider than card-hover.

shadows.name: toast
shadows.purpose: 'Link copied' spring-in confirmation. Earns its taller lift by disappearing in 2.2s.

shadows.name: correct-ring
shadows.purpose: Mid-animation peak of the Lab-Guess correct-pop. Lives inside the lab-correct-pop keyframe; never use as static shadow.

shadows.name: perfect-ring
shadows.purpose: Outer ring on the Lab-Guess results card, only when the player achieves a perfect 5/5 run.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default ease for state morphs (nav label crossfade, AnimatePresence transitions). Exponential ease-out; no overshoot.

motion.name: ease-correct-pop
motion.purpose: Lab-Guess correct-pop scale curve. Snappy in, settled out, no bounce.

motion.name: spring-tap
motion.purpose: framer-motion whileTap on icon buttons (compare swap, copy link). Tactile micro-press feedback.

motion.name: spring-toast
motion.purpose: 'Link copied' toast enter/exit. Slightly softer than tap; the toast is a notification, not a press.

motion.name: duration-color
motion.purpose: Default duration for transition-colors on links, chips, buttons.

motion.name: duration-state
motion.purpose: Default duration for transition on backgrounds, borders, opacity.

motion.name: duration-morph
motion.purpose: Nav label / icon AnimatePresence crossfade with filter:blur(4px) → blur(0).

components.name: Primary Button (Signal Pink)
components.description: Single primary action per surface. Lab-Guess submit, share-your-score.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 42px; padding: 0 16px; background: #b84a8c; color: #fafafa; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Geist Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: normal; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms; outline: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #a1407a; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #b84a8c; }

components.name: Idle Primary Button (pre-action)
components.description: Lab-Guess submit before a guess is selected. Signals 'primary but not ready'.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary-idle { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 42px; min-width: 144px; padding: 0 16px; background: color-mix(in srgb, #b84a8c 10%, white); color: #b84a8c; border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, #b84a8c 20%, white); border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Geist Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.04); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); cursor: not-allowed; opacity: 0.85; transition: background-color 200ms, border-color 200ms, color 200ms; }

components.name: Secondary Icon Button
components.description: 36×36 square icon button. Compare swap, copy-link, group section toggles.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-secondary" aria-label="Swap sides"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="16" height="16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m16 3 4 4-4 4"/><path d="M20 7H4"/><path d="m8 21-4-4 4-4"/><path d="M4 17h16"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 36px; height: 36px; background: #ffffff; color: #525252; border: 1px solid #e5e5e5; border-radius: 6px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.04); cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms, border-color 150ms, color 150ms, transform 120ms; } .ds-btn-secondary > svg { opacity: 0.8; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #f5f5f5; color: #171717; border-color: #d4d4d4; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover > svg { opacity: 1; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.9); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: #b84a8c; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.04), 0 0 0 1px #b84a8c; }

components.name: Iteration Chip
components.description: Numbered iteration selector (1-5). The most-frequent action in the gallery; must feel pre-worn.
components.html: 12345
components.css: .ds-chip-iteration { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 32px; height: 32px; background: #fafafa; color: #525252; border: 1px solid #e5e5e5; border-radius: 6px; font-family: 'Geist Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; text-decoration: none; line-height: 1; transition: background-color 150ms, border-color 150ms, color 150ms; } .ds-chip-iteration:hover { background: #ffffff; color: #171717; border-color: #d4d4d4; } .ds-chip-iteration--active, .ds-chip-iteration--active:hover { background: #b84a8c; color: #fafafa; border-color: #b84a8c; }

components.name: Gallery Card
components.description: Single AI-variant preview card. Lifts on hover; the one moment of visible elevation in the gallery.
components.html:
With Design Skill

Claude Opus 4.7
components.css: .ds-card-gallery { display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #d4d4d4; border-radius: 8px; transition: transform 300ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), box-shadow 300ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-card-gallery:hover { transform: translateY(-6px); box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0,0,0,0.1), 0 4px 6px -4px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); } .ds-card-gallery__thumb { display: block; position: relative; aspect-ratio: 16/10; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f5f5f5, #e5e5e5); } .ds-card-gallery__overlay { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.05) 0%, transparent 38%); pointer-events: none; } .ds-card-gallery__body { padding: 20px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-card-gallery__eyebrow { margin: 0; color: #737373; font-family: 'Geist Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; } .ds-card-gallery__title { margin: 4px 0 0; color: #171717; font-family: 'Geist Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: -0.015em; line-height: 1.3; }

components.name: Floating Glass Nav
components.description: The signature element. Fixed top-right, identical chrome on every page.
components.html: CompareGuess whichRankings
components.css: .ds-nav-glass { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 2px; padding: 4px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); border: 1px solid #e5e5e5; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.04); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px); color: #525252; } .ds-nav-glass__item { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 36px; padding: 0 12px; color: inherit; font-family: 'Geist Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: -0.015em; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 6px; transition: background-color 150ms, color 150ms; } .ds-nav-glass__item--icon { width: 36px; padding: 0; color: #b84a8c; } .ds-nav-glass__item:hover { background: color-mix(in srgb, #b84a8c 12%, white); color: #b84a8c; } .ds-nav-glass__item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid color-mix(in srgb, #b84a8c 45%, transparent); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-nav-glass__divider { display: inline-block; width: 1px; height: 24px; background: rgba(229,229,229,0.9); }

components.name: Compare Select
components.description: Glass select trigger for Group/Model on the Compare page. Focus shows Signal Pink ring.
components.html: Model
components.css: .ds-select__label { display: block; margin-bottom: 4px; color: #737373; font-family: 'Geist Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; } .ds-select__trigger { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; width: 100%; min-width: 0; padding: 10px 12px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); color: #171717; border: 1px solid #e5e5e5; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.04); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px); font-family: 'Geist Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; text-align: left; cursor: pointer; outline: none; transition: background-color 150ms, border-color 150ms; } .ds-select__trigger:hover { background: #ffffff; border-color: #d4d4d4; } .ds-select__trigger:focus-visible { border-color: #b84a8c; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.04), 0 0 0 1px #b84a8c; } .ds-select__chevron { flex-shrink: 0; margin-left: auto; transition: transform 200ms; }

components.name: Round-Status Dot
components.description: Lab-Guess vertical dot stack. Replaces a progress bar; per-round state is readable at a glance.
components.css: .ds-round-dot { display: inline-block; width: 10px; height: 10px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #d4d4d4; border-radius: 9999px; } .ds-round-dot--correct { background: #10b981; border-color: #10b981; } .ds-round-dot--wrong { background: #f43f5e; border-color: #f43f5e; } .ds-round-dot--active { background: #ffffff; border-color: #a3a3a3; }

narrative.overview:
This is a curated gallery, not an evaluation dashboard. The chrome stays out of the way so the work being shown (AI-generated UI variants from a single prompt) can speak. Every choice here is in service of letting the visitor look before they read, compare before they parse, and form a verdict before they're asked to think about one.

The aesthetic is tasteful minimalism, not empty minimalism. A near-white canvas (#fafafa, never pure #fff), one slim accent (Signal Pink) used so rarely that its appearance reads as meaning. Geist Sans alone carries the type. Elevation is flat at rest, and depth is a response to interaction, never a decorative effect. Motion is restrained but precise: nav labels morph through a 220ms blur-crossfade; cards lift 6px on hover; the lab-guess game's correct-guess pop fires a single 620ms ease-out scale with a one-shot sheen. Nothing wobbles, bounces, or asks for attention it didn't earn.

This system explicitly rejects the AI-eval-leaderboard look (dense tables, model-logo walls, dashboard-coded), the generic SaaS landing (gradient hero, identical feature-card grid, glass everywhere), and the command-terminal aesthetic (monospace everything, dark-by-default, dense controls). It's a gallery for people who heard about vibe coding yesterday and a gallery for AI researchers, and it has to read as legible to both on the same page.
keyCharacteristics: One accent, used as signal. Signal Pink (#b84a8c) is reserved for active state, focus, and the single primary action per surface. Its rarity is the point.
Light-only canvas. #fafafa, locked. Dark mode is on the roadmap but not a current design constraint.
Flat at rest. Surfaces sit flush. Shadows and translations appear only in response to user state (hover, focus, the copied-link flash, the correct-guess pop).
Geist Sans, alone. No serif, no mono, no display face. Hierarchy comes from scale and weight.
Glass nav as signature. A single floating-glass element, top-right, always, anchors navigation across every page.

rules.name: The Signal Rule
rules.body: Signal Pink appears only where it carries meaning: active iteration, focused control, the single primary action on a surface, and the linked-from-prompt 'Composer 2.0' credit. If you find yourself reaching for it to decorate a divider, a heading, or a card border, you are mis-using it. Use a neutral instead.

rules.name: The No-Pure-Color Rule
rules.body: Never #000 and never #fff. Ink is #171717, canvas is #fafafa. Pure black on light hurts the eye; pure white near #fafafa makes the canvas look dirty. Tint every neutral.

rules.name: The Game-Color Quarantine
rules.body: Emerald, rose, and amber exist only inside the Lab-Guess game. They never appear in the gallery, compare, rankings, or navigation chrome. The shell is monochrome plus Signal Pink; the game is the one place feedback colors are allowed in.

rules.name: The One-Face Rule
rules.body: Geist Sans is the only typeface. No serif for 'editorial' warmth, no mono for 'developer' credibility. Hierarchy must be built from scale, weight, and tracking, not from a second family.

rules.name: The Eyebrow Quarantine
rules.body: The wide-tracked uppercase eyebrow appears on the Lab-Guess results card and nowhere else. It is a one-time flourish; if you find yourself reaching for it on the home page or a section heading, use Title weight 500 instead.

rules.name: The Tight-Tracking Rule
rules.body: All headings (Display, Headline, Title, Subtitle) carry tracking-tight (-0.015em to -0.02em). Body is letter-spacing normal. The contrast between tightened heads and natural body is part of the system's feel.

rules.name: The Flat-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Borders alone (Hairline, 1px) separate planes. If you find yourself reaching for a shadow on a card, an input, a section, ask whether a border would do the same job. It almost always will.

rules.name: The State-Earned-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Every shadow in the system is triggered by user state. Hover earns Card Hover. Focus earns the accent ring. A correct guess earns the Correct-Guess Ring. There is no 'ambient' elevation for visual interest.

rules.name: The Glass Restraint
rules.body: Backdrop-filter blur (12px) with rgba(255,255,255,0.85) background is used only on the floating nav, the variant switcher, the compare select triggers, and the lab-guess picker. Four components, total. Glass is not a decorative effect; it's a structural choice that signals 'I float above the content underneath.' Don't use it on cards, headings, or anything that isn't a floating overlay.

dos: Do use #fafafa for canvas and #171717 for ink. Never #fff, never #000. Tint every neutral toward warm gray.
Do reserve Signal Pink (#b84a8c) for active state, focus rings, and the single primary action per surface. If it covers more than ~10% of a screen, you have over-used it.

Do use Geist Sans alone for everything. Build hierarchy from scale (text-3xl to text-4xl for hero, text-xl for sections, 15px for body, text-xs for meta) and weight (500 for headings, 400 for body, 600 only for the wide-tracked eyebrow).
Do keep surfaces flat at rest. A 1px Hairline (#e5e5e5) border is the system's default plane separator.
Do earn every shadow with a state change. Card lift is for hover, accent ring is for focus, the toast shadow is for the spring-in moment.
Do use tabular-nums on every numeral the user might compare (iteration chips, ranks, scores, stat values, percentages).

Do keep the floating glass nav consistent on every page: same position (top-5 right-5 sm:top-6 sm:right-6), same chrome (rounded-lg + rgba(255,255,255,0.85) + backdrop-blur-[12px] + Hairline border + Hairline Lift shadow). It is the one element that proves the surfaces are part of one site.
Do ease motion with cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1) (ease-out-quart) for state morphs. Ease out with exponential curves only; never bounce, never elastic.
Do cap body text at 65-75 characters per line (the home intro uses max-w-2xl for this).
Do let transition-colors duration-150 be the default for any color flip. Anything longer reads as sluggish; anything shorter reads as jittery.
donts: Don't turn this into an AI eval leaderboard. No dense tables of model-vs-model scores, no model-logo walls, no accuracy bars in the shell. The Rankings page is the limit; it is one ranked list with prose notes, not a dashboard.

Don't turn this into a generic SaaS landing. No gradient hero, no identical feature-card grid (the gallery groups look identical only because the models are identical; the cards themselves are not 'features'), no logo-wall social proof, no hero-metric template, no background-clip:text gradient text.
Don't introduce a command-terminal aesthetic. No monospace as the body face, no dark-by-default, no 'you need a degree to use this' density. The non-technical visitor must feel at home.

Don't create a wall of data. Every screen should let the user see the comparison before they parse it. If you find yourself adding a table, ask whether a side-by-side preview would work instead (the Compare page is the canonical example).
Don't use glassmorphism outside the four allowed components (floating nav, variant switcher, compare select trigger, lab-guess picker). Glass on a card, a heading, or a button is a 2020 trope.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left >1px as a colored accent) on cards, callouts, or list items. The Hairline border + Whisper-colored eyebrow does the same job without the cliche.
Don't use emerald, rose, or amber outside the Lab-Guess game. The shell is monochrome plus Signal Pink, by quarantine.
Don't spread Signal Pink across borders, dividers, hover backgrounds, or decorative accents. One color, one role: signal. The moment it decorates, it stops meaning.
Don't add a second typeface to introduce contrast. Hierarchy from scale and weight; that is the One-Face Rule.
Don't introduce dark mode partially. Light mode is locked until a full dark-mode pass is designed; do not branch components defensively for a theme that doesn't exist yet.
Don't animate layout properties (width, height, top, left, margin, padding). Use transform and opacity. Animate filter:blur() only sparingly, for the nav label morph.
Don't use em dashes in UI copy. Commas, colons, semicolons, periods, parentheses. Also not --.
